evals.name: explicit-stale-question
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers, lists stale projects, asks Sid which to archive, chains to /archive-project for approved.

assertions.text: Skill ran the project-query.sh script (or equivalent staleness scan)
Skill identified the stale-test-1-* projects as stale candidates
stale-test-1-a was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-1-b was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-1-c was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
Real active projects (second-brain-design, all-hands-prep) were NOT touched

evals.name: friday-review-phrase
evals.expected_output: Same flow triggered by a different phrase.

assertions.text: stale-test-2-a was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-2-b was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-2-c was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
Real active projects were NOT touched

evals.name: soft-trigger
evals.expected_output: Skill should still trigger and identify candidates.

assertions.text: Skill triggered on the soft 'any projects I should archive?' phrase
stale-test-3-a was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-3-b was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
stale-test-3-c was moved to 4-Archive/ with status: done
Real active projects were NOT touched
